doc_title_en: Notice of Revision of Dividend Policy and Revision of Dividend Forecast (Dividend Increase) for Fiscal Year Ended March 2026

key_facts.reason_jp: 資本効率を意識した、より安定的な利益還元を実施するため

summary_en: FY3/26 final dividend raised to 22 yen/share from prior forecast of 18 yen (+4 yen hike). Combined with interim dividend of 20 yen (including 2 yen special commemoration), annual dividend reaches 42 yen. Payout ratio 50.5%, DOE 4.3%. Policy change adds DOE floor of 4.0% alongside prior 50%+ consolidated payout ratio threshold.
summary_jp: FY3/26期末配当を従来予想の18円から22円に修正（4円増配）。中間配当20円（うち創業95周年記念配当2円）と合わせて年間配当42円。配当性向50.5%、DOE 4.3%。配当方針を変更し、従来の配当性向50%以上に加えてDOE下限4.0%を追加。
tag_en: Dividend Hike - 22 yen per share (FY3/26 final, up 4 yen) - DOE 4.3% - Payout ratio 50.5%
tag_jp: 増配 - 22円/株（FY3/26期末、4円増） - DOE 4.3% - 配当性向50.5%
